---
title: "Country details"
root: "../.."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<div class="small-muted">
This page is dynamic: it reads the <code>iso3</code> parameter from the URL, then renders content from <code>data/region_summaries.json</code> and <code>data/datasets.json</code>.
</div>

<div id="countryDetail" class="explorer-panel" style="margin-top:0.8rem">
  Loading…
</div>

<div style="margin-top:0.8rem">
  ← <a href="{{< meta root >}}/part2/explorer.qmd">Back to the Explorer</a>
</div>

```{=html}
<script>
  window.AD_DIVERSITY_ROOT = "{{< meta root >}}";
</script>
<script src="{{< meta root >}}/assets/js/region-detail.js"></script>
```
